holdings.infoBox: SPUS is an equity ETF with a total of 216 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 13.73%, Apple at 11.57%, Microsoft at 7.89%, Alphabet at 5.72%, and Broadcom at 4.97%.

overview.description: The SP Funds S&P 500 Sharia Industry Exclusions ETF (SPUS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 Shariah Industry Exclusions index. The fund tracks a market-cap weighted index of S&P 500 stocks that are Sharia-compliant. SPUS was launched on Dec 18, 2019 and is issued by SP Funds.
